issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as failed scans or non-vulnerable targets.

scenarios.name: Test only the query field of a JSON POST endpoint
scenarios.rationale: Baseline sets JSON via --headers and relies on a star marker rather than --content-type plus -p, so parameter scoping is loose; treatment matches the skill's REST/JSON pattern verbatim.

scenarios.name: Dump username and password_hash from a Burp-captured request
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses -r and --dump but selects columns via --where (wrong flag); treatment uses -C "username,password_hash" exactly as the skill documents and respects the minimum-extraction guideline.
